title: Basic Line Chart
subtitle: We can use the following code to build a line chart which has x-axis as category, y-axis as value:

content.description: In this case, we set the type of axis to category and value under xAxis and yAxis. We also clarified the content on the x-axis through data. In series, we set the type to line, and specify the values of three points through data. In this way, we got a simple line chart.
